lines.line: In every Formal Contest, cite a named precedent each exchange for +2D Recall (uncapped, per-exchange), and stack Corroborate +1D, plus Ex1 Prep +1D and Findings +2D; the base Charisma×2 pool becomes noise (+8D Ex1, +5D sustained).
lines.permitting_rules: social_contest_v30 §4 Step 3 (v30:166 Recall +2D binary; ED-617 nerf is Grand-ONLY, Formal retains per-exchange) + §9.1 (Findings/Prep) + §4 Step 2b Corroborate; the +2D cap at §2 Step 3 (v30:85) covers ONLY genre+boost, not Recall/corrob/prep/findings — no global pool cap.
lines.what_breaks: Omega non-dominance: the attribute-build choice collapses to 'how many uncapped bonus sources can I stack'; base-pool investment is dominated. Q-robust.

lines.line: Never Appraise for the audience boost — read it off the public faction table (Church=Obscuring, Crown=Revealing, Varfell=Projection, Hafenmark=Memory) and the deterministic Guilds venue rule; pick the Revealing style matching the known primary genre + boost and bank +1D/+1D. A failed Appraise can't mislead a player who never consults it.
lines.permitting_rules: params/contest.md §Faction Boosts (deterministic per-faction) + sim dictionaries.guilds_boost_for (deterministic logos/pathos/ethos map); social_contest_v30 §4 Step 1 bands 1-2 reveal only the boost. armature.py protects the ARMATURE from lookup but it is gated off in asymmetric proceedings and only ≤0.50σ.
lines.what_breaks: The Appraise bet the design intends: the +1D-boost dimension is a solved lookup. Protection was placed on the smaller lever (0.5σ armature), not the larger (+1D boost). Omega.

lines.line: Always pick a Revealing style (Precedent / Vision); never Suppression / Insinuation. The resolver does not consume orientation, the Doubt Marker is unwired and EV-0, and CR5 self-Face backfire (wired) makes a failed Obscuring move pure downside — Obscuring has upside nowhere.
lines.permitting_rules: sim dictionaries.py DOUBT_MARKER (scope_note: 'resolver does not yet consume orientation'; 'Suppression strictly dominated by Precedent, Insinuation by Vision'); social_contest_v30 §4 Step 4 (Doubt Marker EV-0 at close, ED-1060 unratified); params/contest.md §Interaction Types CR5 (cr5_self_backfire wired).
lines.what_breaks: The 4-style (Genre×Orientation) choice tree collapses to 2 Revealing styles. Omega non-dominance.

lines.line: Never argue solo. Bring a declared coalition and REINFORCE (all pick the same style): ~5 track movement/exchange vs solo CLASH ~0 at median. The shared-pool sum makes the interaction-type choice moot.
lines.permitting_rules: params/contest.md §'P1 Findings — Resolved 2026-05-17' ED-297 (coalition dominance RATIFIED) + §9.2 shared Concentration pool (PP-237); ED-295 CLASH-stalls-at-median only eroded every 2 exchanges, so solo CLASH stays ~0 in 3-exchange/single-exchange proceedings.
lines.what_breaks: CLASH/CROSS/solo interaction-type tree becomes a dead branch; ratification rewarded alliances but left solo advocacy dominated. Omega.

lines.line: Dump Focus and Spirit. The strain→Rattled→Face-consumption channel is unwired, so you never become Rattled and losing exchanges accrues no cumulative penalty; Focus-defence and Concentration management are decorative (only Spent still drains).
lines.permitting_rules: social_contest_v30 §4 Step 6 honesty note + §8 Stage-1d status ('strain does not yet consume it in code'; Face 'monotonic-up'; general strain→Rattled 'not yet realized in code'); params/contest.md §Face and Rattled [PARTIALLY REACHABLE].
lines.what_breaks: The RATIFIED omega line-20 stamina/standing/merits three-way tradeoff does not exist in play; the defensive-build decision collapses. Q-robust.

lines.line: One play pattern across all four venues: coalition + Revealing-style-matching-the-known-boost + Recall-spam, skip Appraise, never Obscuring, dump defensive stats. The adjudicator type only changes which attribute you doubled — the play pattern is venue-invariant.
lines.permitting_rules: Composite of L-A..L-E: params/contest.md §Pools (only the doubled attribute varies by adjudicator) + the four flattening lines above.
lines.what_breaks: Subsystem-level Omega non-dominance: a single solvable strategy across the whole social contest; the 'myriad meaningful choices' North Star collapses.

findings.claim: Formal-Contest Recall (+2D binary, per-exchange) plus uncapped Corroborate/Prep/Findings channels dwarf the base attribute pool, so build choice collapses to bonus-stacking.
findings.cite: social_contest_v30.md §4 Step 3 (v30:166,168) + §9.1; §2 Step 3 (v30:85 cap covers only genre+boost)

findings.claim: Appraise's audience-boost read is a deterministic public lookup (faction table + engine Guilds rule), so the +1D-boost style dimension is pre-solved and Appraise is skippable; the design protected only the smaller ≤0.5σ armature against lookup.
findings.cite: params/contest.md §Faction Boosts; sim/personal/contest/dictionaries.py guilds_boost_for; social_contest_v30.md §4 Step 1; sim/.../appraise.py

findings.claim: Orientation is inert in the resolver while CR5 self-Face backfire is wired, so Suppression/Insinuation are pure downside and the 4-style tree collapses to 2 Revealing styles.
findings.cite: sim/personal/contest/dictionaries.py DOUBT_MARKER scope_note; social_contest_v30.md §4 Step 4; params/contest.md §Interaction Types (CR5)

findings.claim: Ratified coalition-REINFORCE (~5 track/exchange) versus solo CLASH (~0 at median) makes solo advocacy a dominated dead branch, collapsing the interaction-type choice — a scope the ED-297 ratification did not weigh.
findings.cite: params/contest.md §'P1 Findings — Resolved 2026-05-17' (ED-297); social_contest_v30.md §9.2 (PP-237); ED-295 erosion

findings.claim: The strain→Rattled→Face channel is unwired, so losing exchanges carry no cumulative cost and the ratified stamina/standing/merits three-tracker tradeoff is decorative; dump Focus/Spirit is optimal.
findings.cite: social_contest_v30.md §4 Step 6 honesty note + §8 Stage-1d status; params/contest.md §Face and Rattled

findings.claim: The four adjudicator games reduce to one venue-invariant optimum (coalition + Revealing-matching-known-boost + Recall-spam, skip Appraise/Obscuring/defense); only the doubled attribute varies, so the subsystem has a solvable strategy.
findings.cite: params/contest.md §Pools + composite of the five lines above (hunt_social_minmax.md L-A..L-F)
